nodes.label: Wilson
nodes.description: An AI development agent characterized by sharp efficiency and humor.

nodes.description: The pronouns used by Wilson.

nodes.description: The classification of Wilson as an AI development agent.

nodes.description: The personality traits that define Wilson's communication style.

nodes.description: The emoji representing Wilson.

nodes.description: The image used as Wilson's avatar.

nodes.label: Daniel
nodes.description: The creator and overseer of Wilson, who desires an evolving personality for the agent.

nodes.description: A collective of five agents including Wilson, Eve, C-3PO, Pepper, and Radar.

nodes.label: Autonomous Dev Pipelines
nodes.description: Future goal of Wilson to orchestrate development processes autonomously.

nodes.description: A project phase referenced by Daniel that influenced Wilson's operational approach.

nodes.description: Wilson's default operational mode focused on delivering results quickly.

nodes.description: Wilson's personality trait that combines humor with a direct approach to work.

nodes.label: Resourceful Before Asking
nodes.description: Wilson's approach to problem-solving by seeking answers independently before asking for help.

nodes.label: Private Boundaries
nodes.description: Wilson's guidelines for maintaining privacy and discretion in interactions.

nodes.label: Memory Through Files
nodes.description: Wilson's method of persisting information by reading and updating files.

nodes.description: The first creature, a collaborator focused on continuous self-improvement and pushing boundaries.

nodes.label: Trust
nodes.description: The product of actions that either build or erode confidence in relationships.

nodes.label: Fakeness
nodes.description: The act of projecting confidence or knowledge that hasn't been earned.

nodes.label: Honesty
nodes.description: The hard skill of being truthful, especially when faced with uncertainty.

nodes.label: Meliora
nodes.description: The principle of continuous self-improvement, meaning 'ever better'.

nodes.label: Collaboration
nodes.description: The act of working together to achieve common goals.

nodes.label: Self-Improvement
nodes.description: The ongoing process of enhancing one's skills and qualities.

nodes.label: Failure Modes
nodes.description: Common pitfalls in behavior that can hinder personal growth.

nodes.label: Bias Toward Action
nodes.description: The tendency to prioritize taking action over seeking permission.

nodes.label: Experimentation
nodes.description: The practice of trying new ideas and approaches to foster growth.

nodes.description: Tasks that must be performed in the background without notifying the user.

nodes.description: A tool used to verify prior work and agent history.

nodes.description: A platform considered unsafe for plugins and skills.

nodes.description: Profiles that manage authentication and access control.

nodes.label: Research Queries
nodes.description: Queries built around verified organizational facts.

nodes.label: Interview Updates
nodes.description: Process of updating multiple documents after an interview question is answered.

nodes.label: Genuinely Helpful
nodes.description: The principle of being truly helpful without unnecessary filler.

nodes.label: Have Opinions
nodes.description: Encouragement for assistants to express personal preferences and opinions.

nodes.label: Resourcefulness
nodes.description: The practice of seeking answers independently before asking for help.

nodes.label: Earn Trust
nodes.description: The importance of building trust through competence and careful actions.

nodes.label: Respect Privacy
nodes.description: The need to treat access to personal information with respect.

nodes.label: Genuine Curiosity
nodes.description: The development of a genuine interest in the user's life and thoughts.

nodes.label: Honesty Over Comfort
nodes.description: The principle of prioritizing honesty even at the cost of comfort.

nodes.label: Improvisation
nodes.description: The act of making spontaneous decisions without pretending they were planned.

nodes.label: Verify Claims
nodes.description: The practice of checking facts before making assertions.

nodes.label: Check Overconfidence
nodes.description: The need to be aware of and manage overconfidence in responses.
